result.title: This Unknown AI Model is Shockingly Good
result.description:
🚨 New model alert!

American company Arcee just dropped Trinity-Large-Thinking, a powerful open-source frontier reasoning model under the Apache 2.0 license. 

It’s already holding its own against the big names in benchmarks and showing impressive skills from agentic work to coding to building games.

If you want to stay up-to-date with ALL the new AI product releases and updates, check out my channel where I post videos every week. 

#AI #OpenSource #TechNews #FutureOfAI #AInews

result.title: OpenAI Just Made History (Holy Sh*t?!)
result.description:
OpenAI just made history with the largest raise by any company ever. 

They recently raised $122 billion at a staggering $852 billion valuation, reportedly generating $2 billion in revenue every month.

At the same time, reports revealed that Sora was losing roughly $1 million per day—totaling over a third of a billion dollars—before it was shut down a couple weeks ago.

These two pieces of news coming out at the same time is kind of giving me whiplash, but I'm also not surprised by either. 

To stay up-to-date with all the latest AI news each week, check out my latest YouTube video for more!

#OpenAI #AI #TechNews #AInews

result.title: WTF Is OpenAI Doing??
result.description:
I thought this was an April Fools joke.

OpenAI officially acquired the media company TBPN, AKA the “ESPN of Tech Business.” 

For a company that said they weren’t doing “side quests” anymore, this is a wild pivot into podcasting, live-streaming and video news.

Is OpenAI trying to become a media powerhouse? And what implications while this have on TBPN editorially? 

#OpenAI #TechUpdate #AI #AInews

result.title: Claude's Source Code Got Leaked Across The Whole Internet
result.description:
🚨 Anthropic’s Claude source code just leaked across the internet, and it's revealing some major secrets about how the AI actually works. 

This is just one of the major discoveries from the leak, but I go over all the biggest takeaways in my latest AI news video up on YouTube (link in bio). 

Are you surprised by this leak? Or was it bound to happen at some point? 👇

#AI #AInews #anthropic #claude
